hero.title: Simplifying insurance to protect your future
hero.description: Tailored risk solutions with a deep understanding of the African markets and access to the Lloyd's markets. We listen, design the right cover, and stand beside you at every claim.

whoWeAre.title: A brokerage built to simplify insurance in Angola
paragraphs: Detondo is an insurance and reinsurance brokerage dedicated to providing insurance solutions for companies and individuals, headquartered in Luanda. We offer innovative and personalized risk services in insurance, as well as risk financing and actuarial consulting, focused on capital management and strengthening our clients' balance sheet.

Detondo has a deep understanding of the African markets and access to the Lloyd's markets. Our objective is to protect and strengthen organizations and individuals by offering suitable insurance solutions at competitive prices according to each client's needs.
We value each client, building long-term relationships based on trust and the satisfaction of their needs. Our team is dedicated and committed to delivering excellent service in every interaction.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: To be a global risk solutions provider of choice, delivering exceptional risk solutions through a balanced combination of our strengths — innovation, precision, and service.
vision.valuesDescription: Our values are the foundation of our operating philosophy and guide our decisions and determination to achieve our vision. We set the highest standards in all the activities we undertake.

values.name: Innovation
values.description: Constantly developing alternative solutions for the benefit of our clients. Turning challenges into opportunities.

values.name: Modernization
values.description: Consistently delivering modern, revitalized products and services, and embracing change.

values.name: Proactivity & dynamism
values.description: Exceeding expectations through challenging standards and designing the most effective risk-transfer solutions.

values.name: Service excellence
values.description: Precise advice and tested solutions that achieve and exceed the targets set by our clients and partners.

values.name: Precision
values.description: Permanently providing accurate advice and meeting every established goal.

commitment.title: We are with you at every step
commitment.description: From the first conversation to the claim, our team makes sure the right cover is in place — and that you know exactly what is protected.

pillars.title: Structuring and negotiating the best insurance
pillars.description: We help structure and negotiate insurance tailored to your individual needs. We make sure you understand the product, coverage, and premiums, and that you are placed with the insurer that best matches your profile.

pillars.title: Policy maintenance
pillars.description: Our dedicated consultants handle changes, additions, updates, and cancellations. We engage with you regularly so your policy stays current.

pillars.title: Claims management
pillars.description: Our team will be with you every step of the way. We help file claims and ensure you receive the best service and a fair payout.

personal.title: Cover for you and what matters most
personal.description: From the car to the trip, we cover everyday risks with clear policies and real human support.

items.name: Motor insurance
items.description: Comprehensive cover for your vehicles, with car rental, roadside assistance, and other value-added services. Third-party, fire, and theft cover also available.

items.name: Building insurance
items.description: Your home is likely your most important investment. We make sure it is properly insured with the right premium.

items.name: Home contents insurance
items.description: Household contents covered against theft, fire, water damage, and other events. We run adequacy tests on the sum insured.

items.name: All risks
items.description: All your valuables correctly covered, anywhere in the world.

items.name: Personal liability
items.description: Cover for legal matters that may arise in your everyday life.

items.name: Travel insurance
items.description: Regional or international travel covered for medical expenses, lost luggage, accidental death, and more.

business.title: Cover for every side of your business
business.description: Dedicated professionals identify business risks and design tailored solutions at economical rates, including group schemes.
business.groupDescription: We also provide insurance solutions for group schemes, with the following range of covers:

reinsurance.title: Treaty, facultative, and alternative risk transfer
reinsurance.description: Detondo helps clients meet underwriting and capital-management goals at both start-up and mature insurance companies. We combine specialized reinsurance broking experience with advisory services and flexibility negotiating with a wide range of reinsurers.

treaty.title: Treaty reinsurance raised to a strategic level
treaty.description: We elevate treaty reinsurance to a strategic level addressing clients' underwriting and capital objectives on a portfolio basis. Our international nature lets us provide flexible, structured, priced treaty programmes aligned with customer challenges and goals.
treaty.servicesDescription: We offer reinsurance broking, technical reinsurance accounting, claims management, and contract drafting.

services.title: Contract drafting
services.description: Wording is the foundation of the legal relationship between reinsured and reinsurers. We draft every contract carefully and stay current with new market wordings.

services.title: Technical accounting
services.description: Reinsurance accounts prepared strictly to the contract, profit-commission calculations, and premium adjustments. We manage run-off accounts on behalf of clients.

services.title: Reinsurance broking
services.description: Industry-leading professionals analyse your needs and offer the best available solutions, backed by strong market relationships.

services.title: Claims management
services.description: We work with claims experts to collect, evaluate, and present claims. We invest in technology to speed up communication at the claims stage.

lifeHealth.title: Technical expertise and networks for superior products
lifeHealth.description: Our specialized team offers unparalleled technical expertise, market knowledge, and networks enabling clients to offer superior products and optimize capital management.

testimonials.title: Stories from our clients
testimonials.description: Relationships built on trust, clarity, and fast response.

items.quote: Detondo's team turned something complicated into something simple. They explained every policy detail and were there when we needed them most.
items.author: CFO

items.quote: They placed a reinsurance programme on a tight deadline with terms that seemed impossible in the local market. Top-tier professionalism.
items.author: Technical Director

items.quote: Claim resolved in days, not months. Communication was transparent from start to finish.
items.author: Owner

ctaBand.title: Shall we design the right cover for you?
ctaBand.description: In minutes we can schedule a conversation to understand your needs and present the best available options.

hero.title: A brokerage dedicated to simplifying insurance and protecting your future
hero.description: Born in Luanda to deliver tailored insurance and reinsurance solutions. We combine deep knowledge of the African markets with access to international markets, including Lloyd's.

about.missionDescription: To provide peace of mind and security through reliable insurance solutions. We recognize that each situation is unique and strive to understand every client's individual needs.
about.purposeDescription: To simplify the insurance process, making it clearer and more efficient, so our clients can enjoy the peace of mind they deserve.

capabilities.title: 15+ specialty practices
capabilities.description: Including robust cyber, financial, and professional services practices, along with health and employee-benefits businesses.

capabilities.title: Lloyd's access
capabilities.description: A direct relationship with the Lloyd's markets gives us placements and capacity not always available locally.

capabilities.title: Actuarial consulting
capabilities.description: A dedicated team delivers the analytical substrate needed to thoroughly examine every opportunity.

servicesHub.title: Three business lines, one commitment
servicesHub.description: Each line is led by dedicated specialists. Pick the area that best matches your need and explore the offer in detail.

cards.name: Personal insurance
cards.description: For you and your family: motor, home, travel, all-risks, and more.

cards.name: Business insurance
cards.description: Cover for companies of every size, including group schemes.

cards.name: Reinsurance
cards.description: Treaty, facultative, and alternative risk-transfer solutions.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.description: Fill out the form or send us an email — we reply on business days, usually within 24 hours.
contact.address: Rua nº 121, casa nº 1262 D, Nova Vida — Kilamba Kiaxi, Luanda / Angola
